news.title: 安德鲁王子放弃另一处王室地产租约
news.title0: Andrew gives up lease on Crown Estate property
news.content: 安德鲁·蒙巴顿-温莎被曝将放弃东洛奇小屋的租约，这是他继皇家别墅后放弃的第二处王室地产。
news.content0: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor is giving up the lease on another Crown Estate property, the BBC understands.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 特朗普威胁切断与西班牙所有贸易
news.title0: Trump threatens to halt trade with Spain over military base access
news.content: 因西班牙拒绝美军使用其基地参与对伊行动，美国总统特朗普威胁将切断与西班牙的所有贸易往来。
news.content0: US President Donald Trump has threatened to halt all trade with Spain, after the country barred the US from using its military bases as part of its operation in Iran.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美校园枪手父亲被判谋杀等罪名成立
news.title0: Guilty verdict for US father of teenage school shooter
news.content: 美国佐治亚州校园枪击案凶手的父亲因谋杀、虐待儿童等29项罪名成立，成为美国第三位因子女大规模枪击案被定罪的家长。
news.content0: The father of a teenage boy accused of killing four people in a shooting rampage at a high school in the US state of Georgia has been found guilty of murder, child cruelty and other charges.
news.author: BBC

news.title: OpenAI修改与美军方协议引争议
news.title0: OpenAI changes deal with US military after backlash
news.content: OpenAI因与五角大楼的AI军事应用协议引发用户强烈反对，宣布修改协议，明确禁止其系统用于监视美国公民。
news.content0: OpenAI says it hasagreed changesto the "opportunistic and sloppy" deal it struck with the US government over the use of its technology in classified military operations.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 埃尔顿·约翰全家福入驻国家肖像馆
news.title0: Elton John's family photo hung in National Portrait Gallery
news.content: 艺术家凯瑟琳·奥比为埃尔顿·约翰爵士及其家人拍摄的肖像照在英国国家肖像画廊揭幕，成为永久馆藏。
news.content0: A photo portrait of Sir Elton John, David Furnish and their two teenage sons has been unveiled by the National Portrait Gallery.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 墨西哥大毒枭“门乔”黄金棺下葬
news.title0: Mexican drug lord 'El Mencho' buried in golden coffin
news.content: 墨西哥最大贩毒集团之一“哈利斯科新一代”头目“门乔”在与军方的交火中死亡，其家人为其举行了盛大的黄金棺葬礼。
news.content0: Infamous Mexican drug lord Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, also known as "El Mencho", was buried in a golden casket by his family on Monday.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 黄石公园最大酸性间歇泉时隔六年喷发
news.title0: World's largest acidic geyser wakes up in Yellowstone from six-year slumber
news.content: 美国黄石国家公园内世界最大的酸性间歇泉“埃基努斯”在休眠六年后再次喷发，水柱最高可达30英尺。
news.content0: The world's largest acidic geyser is putting on a show again, erupting for the first time in six years after a quiet hiatus, officials at Yellowstone National Park say.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 曼迪·摩尔夫妇火灾后重建洛杉矶梦想之家
news.title0: Mandy Moore and Taylor Goldsmith nearly lost their dream home in the LA fires. Here’s how they rebuilt
news.content: 美国女星曼迪·摩尔与音乐家丈夫在洛杉矶山火中几乎失去梦想家园，耗时数年完成重建并迁入新居。
news.content0: In 2020, Mandy Moore and her musician husband Taylor Goldsmith bought their dream home in Altadena, California, as a family of two, hiring a team to begin renovating the romantic Spanish Colonial Revival property and update its 1930s charm. In 2023, as a family of four, with another baby on the way, they moved in and began living their new life in Altadena’s enclave of historic architecture, mountain views and small-town charm.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚省将永久采用夏令时
news.title0: British Columbia Will Change Clocks on Sunday for the Last Time
news.content: 加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚省宣布将永久采用夏令时，本周末将是该省居民最后一次调整时钟。
news.content0: Residents of British Columbia will change their clocks this weekend as daylight saving time shifts into place and then will never do so again.
news.author: NYTimes
